note: Mock press releases for the assignment data source. Synthetic, not real announcements.

press_releases.title: Prologis Acquires 2.3M Sq Ft Logistics Portfolio in Chicago
press_releases.summary: Prologis completed the acquisition of a 2.3 million square foot industrial portfolio across the Chicago metro area, expanding its logistics footprint near major rail and highway hubs.

press_releases.title: Prologis Breaks Ground on New Dallas Distribution Center
press_releases.summary: The company began construction of a 780,000 square foot distribution center in the Dallas market to meet rising e-commerce and supply chain demand.

press_releases.title: Prologis Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
press_releases.summary: Prologis reported full year revenue growth driven by strong leasing activity, high occupancy, and rising rents across its industrial and logistics portfolio.

press_releases.title: Prologis Signs Major Lease with National Retailer in Atlanta
press_releases.summary: A national retailer signed a long term lease for a 710,000 square foot warehouse in Atlanta, supporting the retailer's regional fulfillment network.

press_releases.title: Prologis Expands Solar and Sustainability Program
press_releases.summary: Prologis announced an expansion of rooftop solar installations across its warehouse portfolio as part of its commitment to reduce operational carbon emissions.

press_releases.title: Prologis Acquires Last Mile Facility in Los Angeles
press_releases.summary: Prologis acquired a 410,000 square foot last mile logistics facility in Los Angeles to strengthen same day delivery capacity in Southern California.
